name: lustreview
description: A web project utilizing Neon Database and Stripe integration

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const files=['index.html','style.css','wishlist.html','cart.html','checkout.html','contact.html','faq.html','login.html','order-success.html','privacy.html','terms.html','shipping-returns.html','showroom-3d.html','zebra-collection.html','blog.html','cookies.html','site-header.js','site-state.js','catalog-data.js','saved-pages.css','saved-pages.js'];const dest='public';if(!fs.existsSync(dest))fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true});files.forEach(f=>{try{const src=path.join('.',f);if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,path.join(dest,f));console.log('Copied:',f)}}catch(e){console.error('Fail:',f,e)}});console.log('✅ DONE Public ready with version',Date.now())"
